hero.description: Building the future of the web with
hero.subtext: Full-stack developer passionate about elegant interfaces and clean code. Turning ideas into digital products that people love to use.

bio.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
bio.paragraph1: Hello! I am a Full Stack developer in career transition, with 8 years of experience in social media and customer service. My journey into development started as a hobby that quickly became my passion. Currently, I am studying Analysis and Systems Development to formalize and expand my knowledge.
bio.paragraph2: I have a solid understanding of front-end technologies like React, JavaScript, CSS3, and HTML5, used to create dynamic and responsive interfaces that provide exceptional user experiences. Additionally, I am constantly exploring and learning more about Vue.js, Node.js, and PHP, seeking to expand my skill set.
